items.fullTitle: Normative Reasoning in Large Language Models
items.description: The **Seal of Excellence** recognises high-quality Horizon Europe proposals that passed evaluation but could not be funded due to budget limitations. This project explores how large language models can better reason with norms through synthetic dataset generation, alignment techniques, and mechanistic interpretability. This project received a **score of ~95%**, placing it around the top ~20% of eligible proposals in the EF-ENG panel (~2,8K proposals) in the MSCA-PF-2025 call, which attracted +17K submissions overall.
